potions.name: Antipoison
potions.description: Cures poison and grants 90 seconds immunity
potions.drink_message: You drink some of your antipoison potion.

potions.name: Super antipoison
potions.description: Cures poison and grants 6 minutes immunity
potions.drink_message: You drink some of your super antipoison potion.

notes: Only Strength potion and Antipoison are F2P-accessible. Super variants require Herblore skill to create but can be used by anyone. Prayer potion restores points rather than boosting. Antipoison cures poison status; two doses cures venom.
